narrative: Validation of report FR Y-9C for period ending 2026-06-30 produced 2 blocking exception(s) and 1 advisory flag. Reconciliation R2 (Total loans and leases) does not tie to the loan subledger: reported 620,000 vs source 610,000 (delta 10,000, tolerance 100). Edit check EC2 (Total loans = performing + nonperforming) does not foot: components sum to 615,000 vs reported 620,000 (delta 5,000). Two cells moved more than the 20% analytical-review threshold vs the prior period (Total deposits +30.0%, nonperforming loans +25.0%); confirm the drivers. Readiness band: Blocked. These are exceptions for the human preparer and approver to resolve; human sign-off and authorized submission remain outside this skill.
disclaimer: Validation findings and cited evidence only; not a filing determination, certification, or submission. No regulatory report has been certified, signed off, filed, or submitted.
